subject: WM-0159 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified ADR-0015 narrow public root @wuming-town/sim-worker advance helper/session method uses existing PlayerCommandBatch path with explicit target tick; apps/web uses public roots only and does not import sim-core or hardcode wm0150.advance; SetSpeed/Pause and reliable delivery remain separate; Chromium worker-smoke and required checks pass.
